description: Five (quantized model, layer) pairs for hardware acceleration; each layer from a specific QAT checkpoint.

layers.reason: 4-bit is the most aggressive QAT for this model; the single FC is sensitivity-critical. Represents low-bit CNN classifier head for strong compression.
8-bit common deployment; ResNet50 fc is 4x larger than ResNet18. Represents mid-bit large CNN classifier and bandwidth/compute stress.
4-bit QAT on the most sensitivity-critical layer (drop ~0.74). Represents low-bit Transformer attention; motivates mixed-precision or higher bit for attention.
8-bit QAT on large FFN expansion (65K params); quantization-tolerant (drop ~-0.08). Represents mid-bit large FFN where aggressive quantization is safe.
32-bit QAT is effectively full-precision; tiny classifier (256 params), negligible sensitivity. Represents high-bit tiny task head as control or minimal-precision datapath.
